title: VampirismXIronSpell
description: Now, when a player is roasted in an alchemy cauldron, blood from vampirism will appear instead of iron spell blood. Also, blood will not appear if the player is a vampire.
body: Now, when a player is burned in an alchemy cauldron, blood obtained through an iron's spell will be replaced by vampiric blood. Additionally, vampiric blood will also appear if the player is a vampire.
